query: Change the sampling steps to 30 and switch the scheduler to 'karras'.

desired.outcome: The generated audio uses 30 steps and the karras scheduler, with all other parameters unchanged.
desired.quality: Only the KSampler node's steps and scheduler fields are modified; the rest of the workflow (UNET loader, CLIP, VAE, MP3 save) remains fully connected and functional.

_tags.author_rationale: Simple but specific parameter tweak forces the agent to locate and edit the correct KSampler node among multiple components.
